name: Namespace Cloud
description: Namespace Cloud — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Developer Cloud (CI & Builds).

seo.title: Namespace Cloud Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Namespace Cloud analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Namespace Cloud is a CDN / Edge / Acceleration tool.
pros: Global edge network delivers low-latency content
cons: Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
review.not_for: Apps serving a single geographic region

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing, scales up and down

lock_in.reason: CI builds portable but platform-specific configs
